immutable_core.semantic_definition: A stay-level administrative category preserving source-faithful immediate pre-ICU or pre-ICU/MC entry context when available.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per retained ICU stay entry-source category
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Database mappings must preserve the declared administrative grain and keep source-faithful local categories visible unless a governed grouping rule is explicitly approved.

admin_demographic_contract.identifier_scope_rule: subject_id and stay_id are required; hadm_id may be unavailable in Amsterdam and must remain visibly null rather than fabricated
admin_demographic_contract.source_authority_rule: use the source administrative admission/discharge field as the authority for the retained category
admin_demographic_contract.normalization_rule: retain source-faithful origin category with light public-safe label normalization
admin_demographic_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained source category under the current source-field rule; not proof that the administrative concept is absent

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and a database mapping_spec.
